listings.title: Sanus TV Audio/Video Stand
listings.body: Very good condition/from a smoke-free home. Selling as I've decided to use another tv stand that was gifted to me.  Disassembled for easy transport but note the base is heavy; ~ 50 lbs.  Orig: ~ $325 shipped so my price is more than fair. Product Width:	43.25" / 109.86cm Product Height:	43.75" / 111.13cm Product Depth:	23.25" / 59.06cm If interested, let me know when you would like to pick up, and please include your phone # when responding.  I'm free most days and evenings. Thanks for looking. All sales final. Ad will be deleted once sold. A/V

listings.title: Paradigm Soundscape Soundbar/Sound bar
listings.body: Orig: $1633. One of the best premium sound bars. You will not be disappointed with its room-filling clear sound and strong, deep bass (down to 30 Hz like other high-end sound bars.) Excellent condition. Well-kept in a smoke-free home. I never pushed or abused it. 7 x 50 watts Peak Power / 7 x 25-watts RMS Sustained Comes with wall mount, optical cable, power cord, remote and new/unused wireless subwoofer transmitter. Subwoofer unneeded unless you like the walls and floors to rattle and shake. I am not entertaining low ball offers as I'm in no rush to sell and don't mind keeping it as backup to my Sennheiser Ambeo Max. Bargain hunters can find lots of cheaper alternatives (eg., Sonos, LG, Samsung, Vizio or Bose) with more bells and whistles available using cheap quality materials; weight is a giveaway. Comparable audiophile sound bars such as the Martin Logan Vision, Focal Dimension and Sennheiser Ambeo Max use premium components for superior sound and are built to last for years. Soundscape weighs 20 lbs while my Ambeo weighs 40 lbs. Product details: https://www.paradigm.com/en/soundbars/soundscape Many rave reviews. The main complaint was its high price; you get what you pay for; quality components cost money: https://www.techzab.com/37365/paradigm-soundscape-review https://referencehometheater.com/review/paradigm-soundscape-review/ https://www.soundandvision.com/content/paradigm-soundscape-soundbar https://www.techspot.com/products/audio-video/paradigm-soundscape.104657/ https://www.cnet.com/tech/home-entertainment/game-changer-a-sound-bar-an-audiophile-can-love/ https://www.expertreviews.co.uk/tvs-entertainment/soundbars/1402008/paradigm-soundscape-review https://www.residentialsystems.com/technology/product-review-paradigms-soundscape-powered-soundbar https://hometheaterhifi.com/reviews/speaker/soundbars/paradigm-soundscape-5-1-powered-soundbar-review/ https://www.nytimes.com/2015/04/02/technology/personaltech/reviewing-sound-bars-an-alternative-to-tv-home-theater-systems.html Preference for pickup in Peekskill.  I'll drive and meet curbside in either Manhattan's Inwood, Eastside, Downtown Manhattan (Gramercy Park, East Village, LES, Chinatown,)/Downtown Brooklyn, Navy Yard, Ft. Greene, Clinton Hill, North Williamsburg, Greenpoint, LIC/Queens or along the Sprain/Taconic on Sunday (sometimes Saturday) mornings. I would need to know by Friday afternoon. $25 extra to meet in an outer borough to cover extra time, gas and tolls.  Preference for meeting in Inwood or Chinatown when in NYC. When replying, let me know when, where you can meet along with your contact # to coordinate meetup. Cash and cary/All sales final. Ad will be taken down once sold.

listings.title: Samsung Radiant360 R3 Black Wireless Speakers (X2)
listings.body: Selling a pair of these speakers that work perfectly and are in excellent condition. There can work with Bluetooth or with internet in separate rooms. They sound fantastic!

listings.title: Outlaw Audio RR 2160 Stereo Receiver - Like New
listings.body: Bought because I thought my other receiver's right channel was out but it was actually one of my interconnects that went bad.  It was only used < 3 hours so is in like new condition.  Smoke-free home. Comes in original box and accessories. No low ballers, please.  I'm in no rush to sell. Class A/B design (usually found in more expensive amps) with 110 watts for 8 ohms. 28 lbs. Outlaw Audio sells products directly to consumers so there's not that usual dealer markup.  Company and RR2160 have received high praise for outstanding sound and high quality/audiophile grade components at a moderate price. https://www.stereophile.com/content/outlaw-audio-rr2160-stereo-receiver  "...a conspicuously good-sounding audiophile product at a ridiculously low price. Highly recommended." https://www.soundandvision.com/content/outlaw-rr2160-stereo-receiver-review "...a stupendously great-sounding stereo receiver." https://www.cnet.com/news/outlaw-audio-rr-2160-the-audiophile-choice-for-stereo-receivers/ https://hometheaterhifi.com/reviews/receiver-processor/receivers/outlaw-audio-rr2160-stereo-retro-receiver-review/ I'm only free to meet curbside in NYC (Manhattan's Inwood, Eastside, Downtown Manhattan/Brooklyn, Navy Yard, Ft. Greene, Clinton Hill, North Williamsburg, Greenpoint, LIC) or along the Sprain/Taconic on some Sunday (sometimes Saturday) mornings. I would need to know by Friday afternoon. Meetup in Chinatown/LES preferred when in NYC. If interested, let me know when and where you would like to meet and please include your phone # when responding. Cash (only) and carry. No trades. All sales final.

listings.title: Rotel RSX-1067 A/V 7.1 Surround Sound Receiver
listings.body: I didn't use it much so am looking to free up space in my house.  Not only does it look beautiful, sound quality is amazing. No low ball offers, please.  I'm patient and will wait for the right buyer who knows the Rotel name, quality and value.  Excellent condition from a smoke-free home.  Come with manual and original box but no remote (can easily take a universal remote.) Don't be fooled by today's top-of-the line surround receivers that weigh ~ 34 lbs.  This 55 lb Rotel is built like a tank with its heavy front finned heat sink face plate that dissipates heat, 7 individual amps and a heavy class A/B power transformer that only the more expensive, high end/audiophile receivers/amps use; only class A is heavier and runs hotter. http://www.enjoythemusic.com/audiophileaudition/1004/rotelrx1067.htm https://hometheaterhifi.com/volume_12_1/rotel-rsx-1067-receiver-1-2005.html Please note that I'm only free to meet curbside in NYC (Manhattan's Inwood, Eastside, Downtown Manhattan/Brooklyn, Navy Yard, Ft. Greene, Clinton Hill, North Williamsburg, Greenpoint, LIC) or along the Sprain/Taconic on Sunday (sometimes Saturday) mornings. I would need to know by Friday afternoon. Meetup in Inwood or Chinatown preferred when in NYC. If interested, let me know where and when you would like to meet, and please include your phone number when responding. Cash only/All sales final. Post will be removed once sold. Home Theater Audiophile

listings.title: Outlaw Audio BLSV2 Bookshelf Speakers & Arogsy Spire Speaker Stands
listings.body: Both speakers and stands for (will not separate) $800 cash.  My price is more than fair since they are in like-new condition, have very low hours and no longer manufactured.  Bought to use in my living room but sat mostly unused; played on them for  < 3 hours (not a typo or lie.)  Argosy 360i speaker stands have built-in IsoAcoustics speaker-isolation technology.  Speakers come in original box and manual.  Smoke-free home. Designed by former Snell engineers.  Outlaw Audio sells directly so there isn't the normal dealer markup. https://www.audioholics.com/bookshelf-speaker-reviews/outlaw-blsv2 https://argosyconsole.com/spire/spire-i "...it is clear where their manufacturing cost was spent: premium components.  In a highly crowded market of bookshelf speakers at this price point, these are a standout choice.  These are a speaker set where high fidelity was the highest priority as a design goal, and nearly everything in these speakers serve that goal. For those who want a no-nonsense, great-sounding speaker set in this price range, this is an easy recommend." If interested, let me know when you would to pick them up along with your phone # when responding. Cash (only) and carry. No trades/low ballers. All sales final. Post will be taken down once sold.

listings.title: Edward R. Murrow "I Can Hear It Now" Complete 3-Volume 78 rpm
listings.body: ONO Selling a complete, historically significant 3-volume trilogy of Edward R. Murrow’s landmark documentary series "I Can Hear It Now," pressed on original 12-inch 78 RPM shellac records. This rare 3-volume set spans three massive eras of 20th-century history (1919–1949) and features actual broadcast audio, speeches, and narration from Murrow himself. Volume 3 is particularly rare on the 78 RPM format, as it was released right as the industry transitioned to 33 RPM vinyl LPs. (14 Discs Total):Volume 1 (1933–1945): 5-Disc Set in original binder (Columbia Masterworks MM-800)Volume 2 (1945–1949): 4-Disc Set in original binder (Columbia Masterworks MM-881)Volume 3 (1919–1932): 5-Disc Set in original binder (Columbia Masterworks MM-963) Good condition Cash only. Local Pickup Only. Due to the extreme fragility and heavy weight of vintage 78 RPM shellac, I will a not ship this item. Perfect for history buffs, vintage radio enthusiasts, or antique audio collectors! Please message me to arrange a meetup for pickup
